6:
WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
cons_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN czk_customers cc ON y.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
),
cust_agg AS (
    SELECT CustomerID,
           SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption,
           AVG(Consumption) AS avg_monthly_consumption
    FROM cons_2013
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT cc.Segment, MIN(ca.total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cust_agg ca
    JOIN czk_customers cc ON ca.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
    GROUP BY cc.Segment
),
seg_best AS (
    SELECT cc.Segment, AVG(ca.avg_monthly_consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM cust_agg ca
    JOIN czk_customers cc ON ca.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
    JOIN seg_min sm ON cc.Segment = sm.Segment AND ca.total_consumption = sm.min_total
    GROUP BY cc.Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_best WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_best
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           CAST(strftime('%Y', t.Date) AS INTEGER) AS yr,
           SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS eur_total
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2012 THEN eur_total END) AS eur_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2013 THEN eur_total END) AS eur_2013
    FROM seg_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           CASE WHEN eur_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (eur_2013 - eur_2012) * 100.0 / eur_2012
           END AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
)
SELECT Segment AS segment, pct_increase AS percentage_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment AS segment, pct_increase AS percentage_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH male AS (
  SELECT ID, SEX, Admission
  FROM Patient
  WHERE SEX = 'Male'
),
counts AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(Admission) LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(Admission) LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_cnt
  FROM male
),
total AS (
  SELECT inpatient_cnt + outpatient_cnt AS total_male FROM counts
),
pct AS (
  SELECT 
    inpatient_cnt * 100.0 / total_male AS inpatient_pct,
    outpatient_cnt * 100.0 / total_male AS outpatient_pct
  FROM counts, total
)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN inpatient_pct > outpatient_pct THEN 'Inpatient' ELSE 'Outpatient' END AS more,
  ABS(inpatient_pct - outpatient_pct) AS deviation_percentage
FROM pct;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END),0) AS growth_rate
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE d.account_id = a.account_id
      AND c.gender = 'M'
);	----- bird -----	financial
